summary: iter203 comprehensive testing completed. All backend APIs (BEO Builder, Dept Slices, CRM Lifecycle, Echo AI³) working correctly. Frontend BEO Builder 3-panel view, PendingActionBanner, and Conventions tab all functional.
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter203 features fully tested: BEO Builder CRUD+audit+finalize, Dept Slices (engineering/banquet-setup/av), CRM lifecycle (metrics/forecast/contacts/pipeline), Echo AI³ (17 wisdom rules, pending actions with human gate). All working correctly.

backend_iter203a_beo_builder.POST /api/beo-builder/drafts: PASS - creates draft with menu_id, name, guest_count
backend_iter203a_beo_builder.GET /api/beo-builder/drafts/{id}: PASS - returns draft with totals and selections
backend_iter203a_beo_builder.PATCH /api/beo-builder/drafts/{id}: PASS - applies selections, notes, clamps adjustment to ±5%
backend_iter203a_beo_builder.POST /api/beo-builder/drafts/{id}/finali: PASS - creates beo_id in beos collection, status=issued

backend_iter202b_dept_slices.GET /api/dept-slices/engineering: PASS - returns rooms with event_count, safe_work_windows
backend_iter202b_dept_slices.GET /api/dept-slices/banquet-setup: PASS - returns rows with equipment checklist arrays
backend_iter202b_dept_slices.GET /api/dept-slices/av: PASS - returns AV-required events with av_flag_reason

backend_iter203c_crm_lifecycle.GET /api/crm/metrics: PASS - returns warm_leads, contacts_total, contacts_by_stage, events_total, invoices_sum
backend_iter203c_crm_lifecycle.GET /api/crm/forecast?months=12: PASS - returns 12 months array with value
backend_iter203c_crm_lifecycle.POST /api/crm/contacts: PASS - creates contact with valid lifecycle_stage

backend_iter204_echo_ai3.POST /api/echo-ai3/wisdom/seed: PASS - idempotent (added=0 if already seeded, total=17)
backend_iter204_echo_ai3.POST /api/echo-ai3/actions/{id}/approve: PASS - flips to approved with approved_by, approved_at

frontend_iter203a_beo_builder.BEO Builder panel: PASS - visible in Echo Events → BEO/Contracts tab
frontend_iter203a_beo_builder.New BEO modal: PASS - beo-new-modal with beo-new-menu, beo-new-name, beo-new-gc, beo-new-create
frontend_iter203a_beo_builder.Self-Audit button: PASS - beo-audit shows beo-audit-result with 0 issues on clean draft

frontend_iter204_pending_action_banner.PendingActionBanner: PASS - appears at top when pending action exists
frontend_iter204_pending_action_banner.Approve button: PASS - pending-approve-{id} removes action from list

regression_tests.Conventions tab: PASS - shows 2 conventions with Edit/Delete buttons
